column1: ## STING TAG GUIDE V3 — Comprehensive Tag Configuration & Manual Input Reference
## Version: 3.1 | Date: 2026-03-06 | Standard: ISO 19650 | Plugin: StingTools v1.0
## Replaces: TAG GUIDE V2.xlsx and TAG_GUIDE.xlsx
## Note: Naviate formulae and Dynamo workflows removed — all operations use STING CombineParameters
## SHEET 1: TAG FORMAT — 8-Segment ISO 19650 Tag Structure

column6: VALIDATION
column8: AUTO_POPULATED

column6: Must be in ValidDiscCodes set
column8: YES — from category mapping via TagConfig.DiscMap
column9: Select from: M (Mechanical), E (Electrical), P (Plumbing), A (Architectural), S (Structural), FP (Fire Protection), LV (Low Voltage), G (Generic). System-aware correction applies for pipes.

column6: Must be in TagConfig.LocCodes
column7: Location/building code — identifies physical building or area
column8: YES — from room name/number or Project Info via SpatialAutoDetect
column9: Enter building code: BLD1, BLD2, BLD3 for buildings. EXT for external. XX if unknown. Can also set via Project Information > ASS_LOC_TXT parameter.

column6: Must be in TagConfig.ZoneCodes
column7: Zone code — identifies zone within a building
column8: YES — from room Department field or name patterns
column9: Enter zone: Z01-Z04 for specific zones. ZZ for unzoned areas. XX if unknown. Set room Department field to auto-detect (e.g. 'Zone 1' → Z01).

column6: Must match level code pattern
column8: YES — from Revit level name via GetLevelCode (L01, GF, B1, RF)
column9: Derived from level name. GF=Ground, B1-B9=Basement, L01-L99=Upper levels, RF=Roof, MZ=Mezzanine, PL=Plant, PH=Penthouse, AT=Attic, TR=Terrace, POD=Podium.

column6: Must be in ValidSysCodes set
column8: YES — from MEP system connector traversal or category mapping
column9: Select from valid CIBSE/Uniclass codes. See SYSTEM CODES section below. Auto-detected from connected MEP systems (6-layer detection).

column6: Must be in ValidFuncCodes set
column8: YES — from smart sub-function detection based on SYS
column9: Auto-derived from SYS code. HVAC: SUP/RTN/EXH/FRA. HWS: HTG/DHW. Electrical: PWR/LTG. Manual override available via SetFunc token command.

column6: 2-4 alphanumeric characters
column8: YES — from family name matching (35+ specific codes)
column9: Usually auto-detected from Revit family name. E.g. 'Air Handling Unit' → AHU, 'Distribution Board' → DB. Override manually if family name doesn't match standard codes.

column6: Must be positive integer (zero-padded)
column7: Sequence number — unique identifier within group
column8: YES — auto-assigned by AssignNumbers or BuildAndWriteTag
column9: Auto-incremented. Unique within DISC-SYS-LVL group. 4-digit zero-padded (0001-9999). Collision detection ensures uniqueness.
